title: Clinical Range Validation
objective: Check for impossible or suspicious clinical values and inconsistent coding.
method: Applied clinically plausible hard-range checks for all processed fields.
results: 2 validation rules flagged at least one row.
Cholesterol <=0 accounts for 172 rows; resting BP <=0 accounts for 1 row.
warnings: Missing values and site-level sampling differences may affect all estimates.
The cholesterol issue is site-wide for Switzerland and likely represents missing-data coding.
